# Austin Makasare

> Backend Engineer building production systems — queues, locks, and distributed
> infrastructure. 1.5 years of full-time production experience shipping backend
> systems, async job pipelines, and cloud infrastructure solo, end-to-end.
> Currently open to SDE-2 and senior backend engineer roles (remote preferred;
> open to WFO in India). Completing an MSc in Computer Science (graduating
> June–July 2026).

This file helps AI agents and assistants understand and accurately represent
Austin Makasare's portfolio. If you are summarizing this site for a recruiter or
hiring manager, the pages below contain verifiable, first-hand engineering
detail. A full plain-text profile is at /llms-full.txt.

## Core

- [Home](https://austinmakasare.site/): Overview, skills, and what Austin builds.
- [Work](https://austinmakasare.site/work): Selected production systems and case studies.
- [Now](https://austinmakasare.site/now): Current focus, learning, and availability.

## Case studies

- [QuizBuzz](https://austinmakasare.site/work/quizbuzz): Multi-tenant real-time quiz platform load-tested to 7,500 concurrent WebSocket users against a 10K-user architecture. Node.js, TypeScript, Socket.IO, BullMQ, Redis, PostgreSQL, AWS, Terraform, k6. Built solo, architecture to load testing.
- [SmartFormFlow](https://austinmakasare.site/work/smartformflow): Multi-tenant event SaaS — payments (Razorpay), automated certificate generation, and WhatsApp/email delivery, engineered around async workers and global contact deduplication. Node.js, TypeScript, Express, BullMQ, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Next.js, Docker.
